name: testdata-mcp-server
description: MCP server for QA test data

tools.name: getLatestProspects
tools.description: Fetch latest prospect leads from the Opentaps CRM database.

fields.description: Fields to include in the response (partyId is always included)

limit.description: Maximum number of prospects to return (default: 10, max: 50)

tools.name: createTestData
tools.description: Generate synthetic test data using Faker. Returns an array of fake prospect records with firstName, lastName, and companyName. Does NOT insert anything into the database — data is generated in memory only.

count.description: Number of test data records to generate (1-100)

companyStyle.description: Style of company names: 'random' (Faker), 'indian-it' (TCS, Infosys, etc.), 'us-tech' (Google, Amazon, etc.)
